news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes Announces ETF Share Splits

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long GEMI Daily ETF (GEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI) stock, less fees, and expenses GEMG was launched on Nov 5, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes, a trusted provider of single stock leveraged ETFs, announce a 1:20 reverse stock split on two of their ETFs. All reverse...
